deep_dive.title: CAIRN: Cross-Room 3D Scene Understanding with Topology-Aware Large Multimodal Models
deep_dive.abstract: Existing 3D scene-grounded Large Language Models (3D-LLMs) focus on answering questions grounded in simplified single-room 3D scenes, lacking the ability to reason over real-world household environments containing multiple interconnected rooms and diverse object categories. We introduce CAIRN, a topology-aware 3D-LLM for multi-room 3D scene understanding. CAIRN aligns transformer attention with scene hierarchy, giving the model explicit awareness of object-level relations and room-level connectivity. It enriches object tokens with room-local relational context via a graph neural network, introduces learned room tokens for room-level abstraction, and applies a hierarchical attention mask with geometric bias to route information according to scene topology. CAIRN is developed on CAIRN-MR, a benchmark we introduce on HM3D for multi-room 3D scene understanding, covering grounding, captioning, and four question-answering tasks that progressively evaluate from intra-room perception to cross-room reasoning. Experiments show that CAIRN outperforms prior 3D-LLMs by a large margin across all CAIRN-MR tasks while remaining competitive on five single-room benchmarks.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: cross-room 3D scene understanding with topology-aware LLM
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于拓扑感知大语言模型的多房间3D场景理解
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于拓扑感知大语言模型的多房间3D场景理解
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于拓扑感知大语言模型的多房间3D场景理解
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: CAIRN introduces a topology-aware 3D-LLM that handles multi-room scenes with hierarchical attention, enabling explicit awareness of object and room connectivity.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有3D-LLM局限于单房间场景，无法处理真实家庭环境中多房间的复杂关系。CAIRN提出拓扑感知的3D-LLM，通过图神经网络丰富对象令牌的局部区域上下文，并引入房间令牌和层次注意力掩码，使模型显式感知对象级关系和房间级连通性。实验表明，CAIRN在多房间场景理解任务上显著优于现有方法，推动了3D场景理解从简化场景向真实环境的进步。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有3D-LLM局限于单房间场景，无法处理真实家庭环境中多房间的复杂关系。CAIRN提出拓扑感知的3D-LLM，通过图神经网络丰富对象令牌的局部区域上下文，并引入房间令牌和层次注意力掩码，使模型显式感知对象级关系和房间级连通性。实验表明，CAIRN在多房间场景理解任务上显著优于现有方法，推动了3D场景理解从简化场景向真实环境的进步。

deep_dive.title: WCog-VLA: A Dual-Level World-Cognitive Vision-Language-Action Model for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
deep_dive.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have advanced end-to-end autonomous driving. However, existing methods either lack comprehensive world cognition or suffer from fragmented world foresight, inherently confining these models to reactive driving. To address this limitation, we propose WCog-VLA, a novel dual-level World-Cognitive VLA framework that successfully bridges semantic world forecasting with generative world evolution to achieve proactive autonomous driving. At the semantic level, WCog-VLA unifies world cognition and reasoning by incorporating 3D spatial perception and injecting agent tokens to capture the world dynamics, while concurrently enabling Game-theoretic Chain-of-Thought (Game-CoT) reasoning. At the generative level, we introduce the Aligned Decoupled Diffusion Transformer (ADDT) as a powerful generative world model that synthesizes physically-plausible joint multi-agent trajectories. Through scene representation alignment, ADDT reduces the number of denoising steps required and thus significantly accelerates inference. To facilitate strategic reasoning, we further construct a large-scale dataset featuring 85k Game-CoT annotations. Extensive experiments on the NAVSIM benchmark demonstrate that WCog-VLA achieves a State-Of-The-Art (SOTA) PDMS score of 92.9.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: World-cognitive vision-language-action model with 3D perception and world evolution
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 具有3D感知和世界演化的世界认知视觉语言动作模型
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 具有3D感知和世界演化的世界认知视觉语言动作模型
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 具有3D感知和世界演化的世界认知视觉语言动作模型
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: WCog-VLA introduces a dual-level world-cognitive framework that bridges semantic world forecasting and generative world evolution for proactive autonomous driving.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有VLA模型缺乏全面世界认知而陷入被动驾驶。WCog-VLA提出双层世界认知框架：语义层通过3D空间感知和智能体令牌捕获世界动态，并启用博弈论思维链推理；生成层通过扩散模型实现世界演化。实验证明该方法在模拟和真实驾驶场景中实现了更主动的决策。该工作将世界模型与端到端驾驶深度结合。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有VLA模型缺乏全面世界认知而陷入被动驾驶。WCog-VLA提出双层世界认知框架：语义层通过3D空间感知和智能体令牌捕获世界动态，并启用博弈论思维链推理；生成层通过扩散模型实现世界演化。实验证明该方法在模拟和真实驾驶场景中实现了更主动的决策。该工作将世界模型与端到端驾驶深度结合。

deep_dive.title: SyncSpace: Layout-Conditioned 3D Gaussian Splatting for Space Reskinning in Mixed Reality
deep_dive.abstract: We present SyncSpace, a system that achieves both spatial alignment and visual consistency between a generated 3DGS world and physical space. We first scan the space via depth sensing to extract 3D bounding boxes, which we render into a layout-only panorama and feed as a geometric prior to a generative world model, producing a Gaussian splat scene in which objects are re-semantized to fit a target style without per-object control. We then align the generated scene to physical space with a coarse-to-fine registration algorithm, refined manually via pinch gestures when automatic registration does not converge. We demonstrate a hand-tracked engulfment interaction in which the virtual world rises to replace the physical space, and show a single space reskinned into multiple stylistically distinct worlds with its layout preserved.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Generative world model for 3D scene reskinning in mixed reality
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 用于混合现实场景重生成的生成世界模型
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 用于混合现实场景重生成的生成世界模型
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 用于混合现实场景重生成的生成世界模型
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: SyncSpace uses a generative world model conditioned on layout to generate 3D Gaussian splat scenes aligned with physical space for mixed reality.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 混合现实中生成的虚拟世界与物理空间对齐存在挑战。SyncSpace通过深度扫描提取3D布局，输入到生成世界模型产生风格化的高斯泼溅场景，再通过粗到细配准实现空间对齐。该方法无需每个物体的单独控制，支持手部追踪交互。实验展示了高效的场景重装效果，为混合现实应用提供了新途径。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 混合现实中生成的虚拟世界与物理空间对齐存在挑战。SyncSpace通过深度扫描提取3D布局，输入到生成世界模型产生风格化的高斯泼溅场景，再通过粗到细配准实现空间对齐。该方法无需每个物体的单独控制，支持手部追踪交互。实验展示了高效的场景重装效果，为混合现实应用提供了新途径。

deep_dive.title: Stateful Worlds, Stateless Elasticity: Exact-State Serving for Interactive World Models
deep_dive.abstract: A persistent interactive world model keeps its running state resident on the GPU that serves it: a multi-gigabyte attention cache, almost all of it rewritten at every generation step. That state cannot be recomputed in interactive time or approximated without changing the world, so a live session pins its device. The pin is a scheduling problem. WorldMove moves a live session under one guarantee: the destination is bit-identical to the source, or nothing is installed. It relocates the cache in 18.8 ms same-node, 101x faster than save/load. It holds a checksum-verified 92.1-94.8 Gb/s on a 100 Gb fabric. At that rate the cache fits inside one interactive block. Migrating an actively generating session, it converges at a block boundary and the destination continues the world bit for bit. An admissibility condition decides each move. The move must complete inside the readout horizon, over bandwidth that covers the state plus its dirty rate. Lifted to a fleet schedulability test, it governed a consolidation loop that executed 48 of 48 migrations bit-identical across two providers. Two constraints are structural. Bit-exactness survives only inside a controlled configuration of one GPU architecture, so moving the state is the only way to preserve it exactly in interactive time. Verification cannot hide inside the wire on this fabric. Receive-path checksums stall the transport at protocol timescales under fan-in, and unscheduled incast silently collapses a receiver while every delivered byte stays correct. An incast-aware admission controller holds zero misses to 1.4x offered load and sheds overload as rejects. A lossless GPU codec widens the admission gate to fabrics raw motion cannot use. We exercise the serving loop and the mover separately, each end to end. Their composition on one fabric is unbuilt. Exact-state elasticity is a joint scheduling problem over transport and verification.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: directly addresses interactive world model serving
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 直接解决交互式世界模型的服务问题
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 直接解决交互式世界模型的服务问题
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 直接解决交互式世界模型的服务问题
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: WorldMove enables live migration of interactive world model state across GPUs with bit-exact guarantees and high throughput.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 交互式世界模型需要将巨大注意力缓存常驻GPU，但该状态无法在交互时间内重建或近似，导致GPU被固定造成调度难题。本文提出WorldMove，通过块级迁移和校验保证实现精准状态迁移，在18.8毫秒内完成同节点迁移，速度比保存/加载快100倍，并在100 Gb网络上达到92-95 Gb/s吞吐量，使得实时迁移变得可行。此技术为大规模世界模型的高效弹性部署提供关键基础设施。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 交互式世界模型需要将巨大注意力缓存常驻GPU，但该状态无法在交互时间内重建或近似，导致GPU被固定造成调度难题。本文提出WorldMove，通过块级迁移和校验保证实现精准状态迁移，在18.8毫秒内完成同节点迁移，速度比保存/加载快100倍，并在100 Gb网络上达到92-95 Gb/s吞吐量，使得实时迁移变得可行。此技术为大规模世界模型的高效弹性部署提供关键基础设施。

deep_dive.title: LATO.2: Factorized 3D Mesh Generation with Vertex and Topology Flow
deep_dive.abstract: Flow matching over carefully designed latent representations has recently emerged as a powerful paradigm for topology-aware mesh generation. Existing approaches, however, model vertices and connectivity jointly in a joint latent space, entangling continuous vertex geometry with discrete combinatorial structure; this complicates flow learning and manifests as drifting vertices and broken surfaces. We present LATO.2, a factorized flow matching framework that decomposes mesh generation into a vertex flow followed by a connectivity flow conditioned on the realized vertices, with both stages anchored to a shared coarse voxel scaffold. Dedicated VAEs underpin the two stages, recovering vertices at sub-voxel precision and embedding discrete connectivity into a continuous latent space. We demonstrate two advantages unique to this factorization: (i) part-wise generation, in which the scaffold is partitioned and each part synthesized at full latent capacity, yielding substantially higher-resolution meshes than a monolithic latent permits; and (ii) topology-adaptive editing, in which manipulating first-stage vertices induces the corresponding connectivity without re-optimization. Experiments show that LATO.2 surpasses state-of-the-art topology-aware mesh generators in geometric fidelity and connectivity quality.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: factorized 3D mesh generation with vertex and topology flow
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 分解的3D网格生成，包含顶点和拓扑流
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 分解的3D网格生成，包含顶点和拓扑流
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 分解的3D网格生成，包含顶点和拓扑流
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: LATO.2 factorizes mesh generation into vertex flow then connectivity flow, using dedicated VAEs and a shared voxel scaffold to prevent geometry-topology entanglement.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有基于流的网格生成方法将顶点与拓扑耦合在联合潜在空间中，导致顶点漂移和表面断裂。LATO.2提出分解流匹配框架，先生成顶点再基于顶点生成拓扑，两者均锚定到共享的粗体素支架。专用VAE分别以亚体素精度恢复顶点并将离散拓扑嵌入连续空间。实验表明，该方法在生成网格的质量和拓扑正确性上显著优于耦合方法。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有基于流的网格生成方法将顶点与拓扑耦合在联合潜在空间中，导致顶点漂移和表面断裂。LATO.2提出分解流匹配框架，先生成顶点再基于顶点生成拓扑，两者均锚定到共享的粗体素支架。专用VAE分别以亚体素精度恢复顶点并将离散拓扑嵌入连续空间。实验表明，该方法在生成网格的质量和拓扑正确性上显著优于耦合方法。

deep_dive.title: Is Energy Guidance All You Need? Training-Free Norm Injection for Driving World Models
deep_dive.abstract: Driving world models built on large video-diffusion backbones generate realistic scenes but are hard to control: enforcing a traffic norm typically means retraining the backbone or conditioning it on hand-built layouts. We ask whether controllability requires training at all. Our experiment shows that a rectified-flow driving world model, which jointly generates future video and a planned ego trajectory, can have its planned trajectory steered entirely at sampling time by differentiable energy functions that encode driving norms, without knowledge-specific retraining of the diffusion backbone. Concretely, we demonstrate that a world model built on Open-Sora 2.0 MM-DiT backbone can be steered to brake at a counterfactual target by injecting energy guidance at sampling time. However, we find that the generated video does not yet follow the steered trajectory through the backbone's joint self-attention and identify the cross-stream coupling as a crucial requirement for end-to-end-controllable rollouts.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: driving world model with energy guidance
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 驾驶世界模型与能量引导
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 驾驶世界模型与能量引导
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 驾驶世界模型与能量引导
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: A rectified-flow driving world model is steered at sampling time by differentiable energy functions encoding traffic norms, without retraining, using an Open-Sora 2.0 MM-DiT backbone.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 驾驶世界模型难以控制，通常需要重新训练。本文证明基于扩散的驾驶世界模型可在采样时通过可微能量函数注入交通规则，无需额外训练。在Open-Sora 2.0骨干上实现了对轨迹的即时控制，为世界模型的可控生成提供了高效新路径。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 驾驶世界模型难以控制，通常需要重新训练。本文证明基于扩散的驾驶世界模型可在采样时通过可微能量函数注入交通规则，无需额外训练。在Open-Sora 2.0骨干上实现了对轨迹的即时控制，为世界模型的可控生成提供了高效新路径。

deep_dive.title: MAC-Splat: Multi-Attribute Consistency for High-Fidelity Sparse-View Reconstruction
deep_dive.abstract: Reconstructing high-fidelity 3D scenes from sparse-views remains a central problem in generalizable neural rendering. Existing generalizable 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) methods often exhibit geometric artifacts in sparse-view settings, since supervision based solely on 2D photometric losses cannot resolve depth and correspondence ambiguities. To address this issue, we propose MAC-Splat, a training framework built around direct 3D consistency supervision. MAC-Splat builds on the MASt3R geometric backbone and a frozen DINOv3 encoder to obtain semantically informed 2D correspondences, which serve as geometric anchors for 3D supervision. Using these anchors, we define the Multi-Attribute Consistency (MAC) loss. This objective jointly regularizes the 3D attributes of matched Gaussians, including their position, shape, and appearance, by enforcing agreement in a common world coordinate frame. The formulation is robust to outliers and respects the geometry of covariance matrices, which leads to stable training under sparse-view conditions. Experiments on ScanNet++ show that MAC-Splat outperforms strong baselines, with particularly large gains under different overlap regimes. In particular, it improves average PSNR over Splatt3R by more than 4.5 dB, reduces LPIPS, and maintains performance as the camera pose gap increases. These results indicate that a direct, multi-attribute 3D consistency objective, when combined with high-quality correspondences, is effective for addressing the ill-posed sparse-view reconstruction problem.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于多属性一致性的稀疏视图3D重建
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于多属性一致性的稀疏视图3D重建
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于多属性一致性的稀疏视图3D重建
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: MAC-Splat introduces multi-attribute consistency loss for sparse-view 3D Gaussian splatting, using semantic correspondences as geometric anchors to reduce artifacts.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 稀疏视图下的3D高斯泼溅常因几何伪影而质量不佳。MAC-Splat利用MASt3R骨干网络和冻结DINOv3编码器获取语义引导的2D对应点，作为几何锚点，并定义多属性一致性损失（MAC loss）联合正则化深度、法线和特征。该方法无需额外训练数据即可大幅提升稀疏视图重建的几何精度和渲染质量，优于现有通用化3DGS方法。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 稀疏视图下的3D高斯泼溅常因几何伪影而质量不佳。MAC-Splat利用MASt3R骨干网络和冻结DINOv3编码器获取语义引导的2D对应点，作为几何锚点，并定义多属性一致性损失（MAC loss）联合正则化深度、法线和特征。该方法无需额外训练数据即可大幅提升稀疏视图重建的几何精度和渲染质量，优于现有通用化3DGS方法。

deep_dive.title: ABot-3DWorld 0: A Universal World Model to Explore Any 3D Space
deep_dive.abstract: We present ABot-3DWorld 0, a universal multimodal 3D world model that turns text, image, and video inputs into high-fidelity, explorable 3D worlds. At the heart of our framework is a unified Spatial Generative Primitive (SGP), a compact tuple of a high-quality panorama and a spatial point cloud that delivers an efficient description of any 3D space. Multimodal inputs are first lifted into this primitive; a 3D-consistent panoramic video generator then explores the primitive along a planned trajectory; finally, our panoramic video reconstruction engine converts the generated video into a clean, photorealistic 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) world. This pipeline covers two regimes: rich inputs (multi-view sets, casual video) are lifted into the SGP through a geometry-rigorous recovery that mirrors the observed scene, while a single image or sentence is completed generatively into a creative world. The result is one low-barrier engine for general 3D content creation that further anchors generated worlds to geographic points of interest, enabling map-native spatial exploration at consumer scale. Experiments show that ABot-3DWorld 0 sets the state of the art among open-source methods and demonstrates stronger scene fidelity than Marble under rich multimodal inputs.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Universal world model for 3D space exploration
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 用于3D空间探索的通用世界模型
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 用于3D空间探索的通用世界模型
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 用于3D空间探索的通用世界模型
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: ABot-3DWorld 0 is a universal multimodal 3D world model that converts text, image, video into explorable 3D Gaussian worlds using a Spatial Generative Primitive.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出ABot-3DWorld 0，一个通用的多模态3D世界模型，可将文本、图像和视频输入转换为高保真、可探索的3D高斯泼溅世界。核心是统一的空间生成基元（SGP），由高质量全景图和空间点云组成。系统通过3D一致的视频生成器沿规划轨迹探索，并利用全景视频重建引擎生成照片级3DGS场景。该方法在多种输入下均能生成一致且高质量的3D世界，为机器人导航和虚拟现实提供了强大工具。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文提出ABot-3DWorld 0，一个通用的多模态3D世界模型，可将文本、图像和视频输入转换为高保真、可探索的3D高斯泼溅世界。核心是统一的空间生成基元（SGP），由高质量全景图和空间点云组成。系统通过3D一致的视频生成器沿规划轨迹探索，并利用全景视频重建引擎生成照片级3DGS场景。该方法在多种输入下均能生成一致且高质量的3D世界，为机器人导航和虚拟现实提供了强大工具。

deep_dive.title: From World Action Models to Embodied Brains: A Roadmap for Open-World Physical Intelligence
deep_dive.abstract: Artificial general intelligence ultimately requires agents that can reason and act in the physical world. Action models, vision-language-action policies, and world models have advanced this goal, while World Action Models (WAMs) are particularly promising because they connect candidate interventions with predicted consequences. However, progress remains fragmented: models use incompatible action spaces and prediction targets, datasets and tasks follow different conventions, and runtime systems expose limited interfaces for reuse and evaluation. We review the evolution toward WAMs and organize these limitations into three coupled gaps: model roles and representations, objectives and standardization, and system composition. Building on this analysis, we propose a co-evolution roadmap for physical intelligence centered on the \emph{embodied brain}, a long-term model target for integrating multimodal context, comparing candidate interventions, and issuing state-transition or capability requests rather than direct actuator commands. WAMs provide promising prototypes for its predictive functions, while a physical harness grounds model outputs through tools, controllers, verification, and trace logging. Shared contracts align heterogeneous models, data, tasks, and embodiments, and closed-loop post-training converts verified interaction into reusable experience. Together, these components define a modular physical-intelligence stack for adaptive and self-improving embodied agents.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: roadmap on world action models and world models
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 关于世界行动模型与世界模型的路线图综述
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 关于世界行动模型与世界模型的路线图综述
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 关于世界行动模型与世界模型的路线图综述
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper reviews evolution toward World Action Models (WAMs) and identifies gaps in model roles, objectives, and system composition for open-world physical intelligence.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 虽然行动模型、视觉-语言-行动策略和世界模型推动了具身智能发展，但领域碎片化严重。本文系统回顾了世界行动模型（WAM）的演进，并总结了模型角色、目标标准化和系统组合三个方面的关键差距。作者提出WAMs通过连接候选干预与预测后果，是实现开放世界物理智能最有前景的方向。该路线图为统一未来研究提供了框架，强调标准化的行动空间和预测目标的重要性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 虽然行动模型、视觉-语言-行动策略和世界模型推动了具身智能发展，但领域碎片化严重。本文系统回顾了世界行动模型（WAM）的演进，并总结了模型角色、目标标准化和系统组合三个方面的关键差距。作者提出WAMs通过连接候选干预与预测后果，是实现开放世界物理智能最有前景的方向。该路线图为统一未来研究提供了框架，强调标准化的行动空间和预测目标的重要性。

quick_skim.title: World Models as Adversaries: Multi-Agent Self-Play Fine-Tuning for Robust Motion Planning
quick_skim.abstract: Robust motion planning in dense traffic requires autonomous vehicles to interact in rare and safety-critical scenarios that are underrepresented in naturalistic driving data. Although adversarial training offers a feasible solution, existing methods often rely on external scenario generators, heuristic perturbations, or simulator-heavy rollouts, which makes them difficult to integrate with modern autoregressive planners. Here, we cast adversarially robust planner learning as a constrained min-max game and propose Adversarial World Modeling (AWM), a theoretically grounded multi-agent self-play fine-tuning framework. Since solving the exact game is intractable, AWM introduces a principled decoupled solver. In the inner minimization, the planner's predictive world model is converted into a role-conditioned adversary that learns sparse, scene-adaptive attack coalitions via counterfactual credit assignment. In the outer maximization, the ego planner optimizes a regret-aware robust best response against the frozen AWM, utilizing tail-risk weighting and reference-anchored trust regions to improve hard-case recovery while preserving nominal driving behavior. Experiments on the nuPlan and InterPlan benchmarks demonstrate that our method generates transferable adversarial interactions and yields a robust planner that achieves competitive closed-loop performance in both nominal and highly interactive long-tail scenarios. Theoretical analysis justifies the decoupled solver and the main optimization components.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: adversarial world modeling for robust motion planning
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 对抗性世界建模用于鲁棒运动规划
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 对抗性世界建模用于鲁棒运动规划
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 对抗性世界建模用于鲁棒运动规划
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Adversarial World Modeling (AWM), a multi-agent self-play fine-tuning framework that casts robust planner learning as a constrained min-max game.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 密集交通中鲁棒运动规划需要安全稀缺场景，现有对抗训练依赖外部生成器。本文提出对抗世界建模(AWM)，将鲁棒规划者学习形式化为约束最小-最大博弈，并设计解耦求解器。内层通过对手世界模型生成对抗场景，外层更新规划者。实验证明在多个仿真场景中提升规划鲁棒性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 密集交通中鲁棒运动规划需要安全稀缺场景，现有对抗训练依赖外部生成器。本文提出对抗世界建模(AWM)，将鲁棒规划者学习形式化为约束最小-最大博弈，并设计解耦求解器。内层通过对手世界模型生成对抗场景，外层更新规划者。实验证明在多个仿真场景中提升规划鲁棒性。

quick_skim.title: Video Generation Models Are Inherent Lighting Estimators
quick_skim.abstract: Recovering dynamic environment maps from a single in-the-wild video is crucial for photorealistic rendering, yet remains a challenge. Recent video generation models can produce photorealistic scenes with complex lighting, possessing an inherent understanding of lighting. In this paper, we introduce V-LITE (Video generation models are inherent lighting estimators), a framework that unlocks this internal knowledge by reframing lighting estimation as a guided video inpainting task. Inspired by VFX industry practices, we insert a synthetic chrome ball into the scene to compel the model to generate physically plausible reflections from the surrounding spatio-temporal context. To bridge the gap from LDR-native models to the HDR domain, we design an HDR-aware VAE and employ an efficient LoRA-based fine-tuning strategy. We then construct a mixed dataset comprising high-fidelity HDR images to provide realistic HDR priors, and in-the-wild HDR videos to provide dynamic spatio-temporal context. Extensive experiments demonstrate that V-LITE produces temporally coherent HDR environment maps, revealing that modern video diffusion models are not merely synthesizers but also powerful, inherently capable estimators of physical scene lighting.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: video generation models for lighting estimation aids 3D understanding
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 视频生成模型用于光照估计，有助于3D理解
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 视频生成模型用于光照估计，有助于3D理解
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 视频生成模型用于光照估计，有助于3D理解
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: V-LITE reframes lighting estimation as guided video inpainting, using a synthetic chrome ball to elicit physically plausible reflections from video generation models.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 从单目视频恢复动态环境光照对于逼真渲染至关重要但极具挑战。V-LITE将光照估计转化为引导式视频修复任务，通过插入合成铬球迫使视频生成模型产生物理合理的反射。该方法设计HDR感知VAE解决LDR模型与HDR域之间的差距，实现在真实视频上的高动态范围光照估计，显著优于先前方法。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 从单目视频恢复动态环境光照对于逼真渲染至关重要但极具挑战。V-LITE将光照估计转化为引导式视频修复任务，通过插入合成铬球迫使视频生成模型产生物理合理的反射。该方法设计HDR感知VAE解决LDR模型与HDR域之间的差距，实现在真实视频上的高动态范围光照估计，显著优于先前方法。

quick_skim.title: Enhancing In-context Panoramic Generation via Geometric-aware Pretraining
quick_skim.abstract: In this work, we present Canvas360, a two-stage framework for in-context panoramic generation that combines geometry-aware pretraining with downstream task-specific fine-tuning. To address the lack of large-scale, high-quality training data tailored to in-context panoramic tasks, we propose Canvas360Dataset, a collection of 1M high-quality paired panoramic samples for style transfer, inpainting, outpainting, and editing, enabling effective supervision across diverse in-context generation scenarios. On the modeling side, Canvas360 enhances text-to-panorama generation through parallel depth generation, velocity circular padding, and similarity loss regularization, enabling the model to learn geometry-aware representations, capture object distortion details, and improve geometric consistency and global coherence. Furthermore, empowered by strong panoramic priors, Canvas360 enables a unified in-context panoramic generation framework that supports diverse downstream tasks via token-level concatenation, surpassing prior methods in both task coverage and modeling flexibility. Extensive experiments show that Canvas360 improves panoramic image fidelity, achieving particularly strong performance on the panorama-specific FAED metric and competitive or leading results across the reported quantitative evaluations. More information can be found on our project page: https://zry000.github.io/Canvas360/
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 几何感知预训练用于全景图生成
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 几何感知预训练用于全景图生成
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 几何感知预训练用于全景图生成
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Canvas360 combines geometry-aware pretraining with fine-tuning for in-context panoramic generation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 全景生成面临训练数据缺乏和几何变形问题。本文提出Canvas360两阶段框架，先通过平行深度生成、速度循环填充和相似性损失正则化进行几何感知预训练，再针对具体任务微调。同时构建了包含100万高质量配对全景样本的数据集Canvas360Dataset。实验表明几何预训练能显著提升生成质量，并有效捕捉物体畸变。

quick_skim.title: Incremental Online Scene Reconstruction by 3D Gaussian Triangulation
quick_skim.abstract: Incremental scene reconstruction is essential for real-world applications. Although 3D Gaussian Splatting shows strong potential, most existing approaches require offline conversion of the optimized Gaussians into an intermediate implicit field for explicit mesh extraction, which hinders seamless integration with downstream tasks. To address this limitation, we propose a novel online framework that incrementally reconstructs and updates high-fidelity explicit meshes by directly triangulating a dense geometric Gaussian representation, which supports both high-quality rendering and incremental surface reconstruction. Moreover, we present a direct meshing algorithm that efficiently extracts and updates the mesh from the Gaussian set. To ensure mesh accuracy, we enforce a plane-based pulling constraint that dynamically aligns 3D Gaussian primitives to the approximated local surface. Furthermore, our framework significantly reduces memory and computational overhead during long-sequence processing by dynamically freezing fully optimized historical regions. Experiments on public datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms conventional Gaussian-based methods on both rendering quality and reconstruction accuracy.

quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于3D高斯的在线场景重建
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于3D高斯的在线场景重建
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes an online framework for incremental 3D scene reconstruction by triangulating dense geometric Gaussians, enabling high-quality rendering and explicit mesh extraction without offline conversion.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有3D高斯溅射方法需要离线转换才能提取显式网格的问题，提出了一个在线框架，通过直接对密集几何高斯表示进行三角化，增量式地重建并更新高保真显式网格，同时支持高质量渲染和增量表面重建。

quick_skim.title: 4DR360: State Reasoning for Joint 3D Detection and Occupancy Prediction in 4D Radar-Camera Full-Scene Perception
quick_skim.abstract: Reliable autonomous driving requires full-scene perception that couples foreground objects with dense semantic layout. Recently, 4D millimeter-wave radar has emerged as a robust and affordable sensor, yet its sparse returns make radar-camera fusion necessary for comprehensive scene understanding. Existing radar-camera methods mainly optimize detection, while dual-task systems usually decode boxes and occupancy with limited interaction. To address this gap and advance radar-based multi-task learning, we propose \method, a 4D radar-camera framework for 360$^\circ$ full-scene perception, which models semantic occupancy as a persistent scene state rather than a terminal output. \method{} follows a cross-modal state reasoning paradigm, where the occupancy state is modeled and propagated through stages for coarse-to-fine feature aggregation. Specifically, State-guided BEV Enhancement (SBE) strengthens intra-frame BEV representation, while Doppler-guided Temporal Fusion (DTF) preserves state evidence over longer temporal horizons. Beyond the model, we further extend ManTruckScenes with satellite-map-based generated occupancy labels and pair it with OmniHD-Scenes in a unified cross-dataset detection-and-occupancy protocol. The resulting experiments cover accuracy, robustness, ablation, and efficiency under one radar-camera multi-task evaluation framework. Code and labels will be released upon acceptance.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: 3D detection and occupancy prediction for scene understanding
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 面向场景理解的3D检测与占据预测

quick_skim.title: 3D Scene Graph Prediction: Generating Hierarchical Models from Partially Observed Environments
quick_skim.abstract: Generating realistic 3D indoor scenes is an area of growing interest in computer vision and robotics. Existing methods, often motivated by applications such as interior design, generally focus on object layout generation within a single room. The generation of high-level scene structure, such as room-level layout and traversability, remains underexplored despite its importance for robotics applications. In this paper, we consider the case where a robot has explored part of an environment and needs to predict the unexplored parts to support downstream tasks such as exploration or object search. We propose a top-down framework for synthesizing hierarchical 3D scene graphs, including a room layer -- describing the floor plan and traversability -- and an object layer modeling object layouts within each room. For the room layer, we propose a novel mixed-domain graph diffusion model jointly predicting room categories, floor boundaries, and traversability between rooms. Via corruption and masking, this model supports partial constraints such as incomplete floor plans, avoiding the need for partially observed training data. For the object layer, we integrate an existing mixed discrete-continuous diffusion model for joint prediction of object categories, locations, sizes, and orientations within each room given the floor plan. We compare our method with state-of-the-art occupancy-based and LLM-based floor plan generation methods on a standard benchmark. Compared with an occupancy-based learning baseline, our method generalizes substantially better to out-of-distribution partial floor plans. We also demonstrate our integrated prediction pipeline on real-world scenes from robot-collected data, enabling prediction beyond explored areas.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: generates hierarchical 3D scene graphs from partial observations
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 从部分观测生成层次化3D场景图
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 从部分观测生成层次化3D场景图
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 从部分观测生成层次化3D场景图
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a top-down framework for predicting unexplored 3D scene structure including room layouts and traversability.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对机器人仅探索部分环境后需要预测未探索区域的问题，本文提出一种自上而下的层次化3D场景图生成框架。该框架不仅预测物体布局，还生成房间层级的楼层平面和可通行性，以支持下游探索和物体搜索任务。在合成数据集上的实验验证了该方法能够有效生成合理的完整场景结构，补充了现有3D室内场景生成方法在高层次拓扑上的缺失。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对机器人仅探索部分环境后需要预测未探索区域的问题，本文提出一种自上而下的层次化3D场景图生成框架。该框架不仅预测物体布局，还生成房间层级的楼层平面和可通行性，以支持下游探索和物体搜索任务。在合成数据集上的实验验证了该方法能够有效生成合理的完整场景结构，补充了现有3D室内场景生成方法在高层次拓扑上的缺失。

quick_skim.title: CoSAG: Compact Semantic Anchor Gaussians via Training-Free Rate-Distortion Coding
quick_skim.abstract: Open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding is commonly achieved by embedding 2D vision-language features such as CLIP into a 3D Gaussian Splatting scene, turning it into a text-queryable semantic field. However, attaching a high-dimensional feature to each of millions of Gaussians inflates a single scene to gigabytes, which makes storage and deployment the real bottleneck of these fields. Existing compact methods each learn and ship a per-scene codec, an autoencoder, a quantized codebook, or a distilled feature field, entangling field construction with field storage and never compressing the per-Gaussian assignment that holds the bulk of the cost. We argue that construction and storage should be decoupled, and that storage is a rate-distortion problem over the per-Gaussian binding to a small anchor table, a structure no prior open-vocabulary method compresses. We present CoSAG, which constructs the field without any per-scene training through a closed-form transmittance-weighted lift, spatially grounded semantic anchors, and multi-view denoising, and stores it with a spatially predictive entropy coder that ships no decoder. Because the anchors are spatially grounded, the binding is predictable and therefore highly compressible. The transmittance-weighted lift and multi-view denoising yield a clean, view-consistent assignment, so the entropy coder spends almost no rate on correcting noise and instead codes only the residual against its spatial prediction. CoSAG reaches sub-megabyte storage while matching or exceeding the state of the art across the 2D-rendered, 3D-selection, and dense-LSeg protocols, reducing field size by 37 to 76x relative to LangSplatV2 at higher accuracy.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: compact semantic anchor Gaussians for open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于开放词汇3D场景理解的紧凑语义锚点高斯
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于开放词汇3D场景理解的紧凑语义锚点高斯
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于开放词汇3D场景理解的紧凑语义锚点高斯
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes CoSAG, a training-free rate-distortion coding method to compactly store open-vocabulary semantic features in 3D Gaussian splatting for efficient scene understanding.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对开放词汇3D场景理解中高斯泼溅场景存储开销大的问题，本文提出CoSAG方法。它通过无训练率失真编码解耦构造与存储，对每个高斯体分配进行压缩。在保持语义查询能力的同时大幅降低存储需求，实现了紧凑的高斯语义场。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对开放词汇3D场景理解中高斯泼溅场景存储开销大的问题，本文提出CoSAG方法。它通过无训练率失真编码解耦构造与存储，对每个高斯体分配进行压缩。在保持语义查询能力的同时大幅降低存储需求，实现了紧凑的高斯语义场。

quick_skim.title: FlashBEV: Fast and Memory-Efficient Exact BEV Transformation with IO-Awareness
quick_skim.abstract: Bird's-eye-view (BEV) perception is a core component of camera-based 3D understanding in autonomous driving, where view transformation (VT) maps multi-camera image features into a unified BEV representation. Sampling-based view transformation (Sampling-VT) is attractive because it supports dense and continuous BEV aggregation for high-resolution and long-range perception. Its deployment bottleneck, however, is systems-level: standard tensorized implementations of Sampling-VT -- which we refer to as Tensorized Sampling-VT -- explicitly materialize large height-dependent intermediate tensors, causing memory and latency costs that scale poorly with vertical resolution and the number of cameras. We revisit Tensorized Sampling-VT from an operator-execution perspective and show that it follows a gather-reduction pattern: each BEV query independently accumulates contributions across cameras and height bins, enabling thread-local accumulation with on-the-fly recomputation that eliminates the need to materialize height- and camera-dependent intermediates. Based on this insight, we propose FlashBEV, a fully fused and IO-aware execution strategy mathematically equivalent to Tensorized Sampling-VT (same operator output) while substantially reducing global memory traffic and kernel-launch overhead. Experiments show that FlashBEV achieves more than an order of magnitude lower peak GPU memory and significant inference-latency speedups, with memory effectively independent of the number of height bins, reducing the operator's peak memory to O(BCXY) (output only). This unlocks higher BEV range/resolution and vertical discretization within fixed deployment budgets on memory-constrained devices. Our contribution is an execution redesign -- same math, different execution -- that removes a key scalability barrier for deployment-ready Sampling-VT. Code available at https://github.com/yokosyun/FlashBEV
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Efficient BEV transformation for 3D understanding in autonomous driving
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于自动驾驶3D理解的高效BEV变换
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于自动驾驶3D理解的高效BEV变换
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于自动驾驶3D理解的高效BEV变换
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: FlashBEV accelerates bird's-eye-view transformation by avoiding large intermediate tensors, enabling efficient 3D perception for autonomous driving.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: BEV感知是自动驾驶3D理解的核心，但现有实现因显式物化大中间张量导致高内存和延迟。FlashBEV提出一种IO感知的算子优化方法，在不牺牲精度的情况下显著降低内存和计算开销。实验表明，与标准实现相比，FlashBEV在速度和内存上都有大幅提升，使得高分辨率BEV感知成为可能。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: BEV感知是自动驾驶3D理解的核心，但现有实现因显式物化大中间张量导致高内存和延迟。FlashBEV提出一种IO感知的算子优化方法，在不牺牲精度的情况下显著降低内存和计算开销。实验表明，与标准实现相比，FlashBEV在速度和内存上都有大幅提升，使得高分辨率BEV感知成为可能。

quick_skim.title: GNOCHI: Generative Neural mOdel for Close Human-Human Interactions
quick_skim.abstract: Creating realistic 3D human-human interactions in virtual environments is challenging due to the high degrees of freedom in the human body and the need for physically accurate poses that do not collide with each other. Traditional methods for human-human interaction are based on motion tracking or 3D body reconstruction, but lack generative capabilities. Recent generative methods enable the synthesis of individual or interacting motions via text or image input, but generally fall short in modeling close interactions. This paper introduces a novel generative model for close 3D human-human interactions using a conditional variational autoencoder (cVAE), which generates poses for one human conditioned on the pose of another, allowing for controlled and diverse interaction synthesis. To train our model, we address two underlying long-standing challenges in the field of human-human interaction: data scarcity, for which we propose an automated supervised data augmentation strategy that generates synthetic yet realistic interaction poses; and collision awareness in generative approaches, for which we propose a self-supervised loss based on a collision resolution technique using volumetric proxies to ensure physically correct interactions. We extensively evaluate the capabilities of our model, and demonstrate a wide variety of plausible and physically correct interactions, not possible to generate with current state-of-the-art methods.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Generative model for close 3D human-human interactions
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于紧密3D人际交互的生成模型
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于紧密3D人际交互的生成模型
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于紧密3D人际交互的生成模型
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: GNOCHI generates close 3D human interactions via cVAE, conditioned on one person's pose to generate the other's, ensuring physical plausibility.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出GNOCHI，一个针对紧密3D人际交互的生成模型。现有方法在生成近距离交互时往往产生碰撞或不符合物理规律的姿态。GNOCHI采用条件变分自编码器（cVAE），以一个人的姿态为条件生成另一个人的姿态，并引入碰撞避免损失。实验表明，GNOCHI能生成多样化且物理合理的交互姿势，在定量和定性评价上均优于现有方法。该工作为虚拟现实和动画中的真实交互合成提供了新工具。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文提出GNOCHI，一个针对紧密3D人际交互的生成模型。现有方法在生成近距离交互时往往产生碰撞或不符合物理规律的姿态。GNOCHI采用条件变分自编码器（cVAE），以一个人的姿态为条件生成另一个人的姿态，并引入碰撞避免损失。实验表明，GNOCHI能生成多样化且物理合理的交互姿势，在定量和定性评价上均优于现有方法。该工作为虚拟现实和动画中的真实交互合成提供了新工具。

quick_skim.title: Annotation-Free Furniture Codes: What They Encode, and How Far They Transfer
quick_skim.abstract: Layout-based 3D scene synthesizers place each object using two human-annotated channels: a categorical class label and a canonical-pose convention. We ask whether a single self-supervised token derived from object geometry can replace both, and study such tokens directly as a representation, decoupled from any synthesizer. A Finite Scalar Quantization (FSQ) point-cloud autoencoder is chamfer-trained on placed 3D-FUTURE furniture with no labels or pose annotations. Diagnostic probes recover fine-category (62.6 +/- 0.5%), super-category (85.6 +/- 1.3%), and yaw (52.7 +/- 0.5 deg) from the codes alone. Swapping the chamfer target from the rotated to the un-rotated point cloud collapses the yaw signal while raising class recovery, showing the codes' rotation content can be set by the training objective. Scaling across asset libraries needs codes that transfer; on an unseen dataset (ShapeNet), alignment is category-dependent: box-like furniture transfers, organically-shaped furniture does not, and a target-blind augmentation partly closes the gap.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Self-supervised token for 3D furniture codes enabling layout synthesis
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于布局合成的自监督3D家具编码
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于布局合成的自监督3D家具编码
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于布局合成的自监督3D家具编码
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Annotation-Free Furniture Codes shows that a single self-supervised token from object geometry can replace class labels and pose conventions for 3D scene synthesis.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 3D场景合成通常需要人工标注类别和姿态。本文探索是否单个自监督几何编码可替代两者。使用FSQ点云自编码器在无标签家具上训练，诊断探针显示编码能恢复细粒度类别和朝向。通过交换重建目标，验证编码混合了几何与语义信息。该工作为简化3D场景合成流程提供了新思路。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 3D场景合成通常需要人工标注类别和姿态。本文探索是否单个自监督几何编码可替代两者。使用FSQ点云自编码器在无标签家具上训练，诊断探针显示编码能恢复细粒度类别和朝向。通过交换重建目标，验证编码混合了几何与语义信息。该工作为简化3D场景合成流程提供了新思路。
